name: PollMedia
description: At most one of the optional fields can be present in any given object.

fields.name: animation
fields.description: Media is an animation, information about the animation

fields.name: audio
fields.description: Media is an audio file, information about the file; currently, can't be received in a poll option

fields.name: document
fields.description: Media is a general file, information about the file; currently, can't be received in a poll option

fields.name: live_photo
fields.description: Media is a live photo, information about the live photo

fields.name: location
fields.description: Media is a shared location, information about the location

fields.name: photo
fields.description: Media is a photo, available sizes of the photo

fields.name: sticker
fields.description: Media is a sticker, information about the sticker; currently, for poll options only

fields.name: venue
fields.description: Media is a venue, information about the venue

fields.name: video
fields.description: Media is a video, information about the video
